scenario.name: INVITE with RTP TCP
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:0000000002@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:172.22.0.21:5060;lr;transport=TCP> From: <sip:0000000001@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:0000000002@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:0000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:0000000002@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:172.22.0.21:5060;lr;transport=TCP> From: <sip:0000000001@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:0000000002@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:0000000002@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:172.22.0.21:5060;lr;transport=TCP> From: <sip:0000000001@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:0000000002@ims.mnc001.mcc001.3gppnetwork.org>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
